name: RecoveryStorageOperationContracts
description: Typed backup, restore, evolution, status, validation, and activation contracts covering every durable Ledger type.
schema_def: backup.create/verify validate private artifacts, checksums, schema/integrity/counts, category hierarchy acyclicity/current ancestry, evidence uniqueness, decision-link consistency, statement-authoritative replacement, dimension carry-forward or unknown initialization, relationship-replacement/conservation chains, coverage, cardinality, exact totals/groups, history, and idempotency. restore.prepare/evolution.prepare build an isolated verified candidate. restore.activate/evolution.activate require explicit authorization plus expected fingerprints, revalidate under exclusive lock, and atomically replace CURRENT. status returns safe metadata. Stable errors distinguish integrity, incompatible schema/policy, stale candidate, activation conflict, host protection, disk, permission, and busy.
